zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Barton Blennerhasset於1423年4月出生在英國諾福爾可阿特萊包盧時，他的父親Sir Ralph Blennerhasset15歲，母親Johanna Joan de Lowdham14歲。他於大約1447年與Jane Margaret Heigham在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1510年11月8日在英國素福爾可哈維爾爾享年87歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可迪斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Barton Blennerhasset于1423年4月出生在英国諾福爾可阿特萊包盧时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Blennerhasset15岁，母亲Johanna Joan de Lowdham14岁。他于大约1447年与Jane Margaret Heigham在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1510年11月8日在英国素福爾可哈維爾爾享年87岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可迪斯。

nameMeanings.name: Blennerhasset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Barton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name from any of the numerous places in England so called from Old English bere ‘barley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Barton Blennerhasset was born in April 1423, in Attleborough, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Ralph Blennerhasset, was 15 and his mother, Johanna Joan de Lowdham, was 14. He married Jane Margaret Heigham about 1447, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 November 1510, in Haverhill, Suffolk, England, at the age of 87, and was buried in Diss, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Barton Blennerhasset est né en avril 1423, à Attleborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Blennerhasset, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Johanna Joan de Lowdham, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Jane Margaret Heigham environ 1447, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1510, à Haverhill, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Diss, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Ki: Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Barton Blennerhasset im April 1423 in Attleborough, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Blennerhasset 15 und seine Mutter Johanna Joan de Lowdham 14. Er hat um 1447 in England Jane Margaret Heigham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. November 1510 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Haverhill, Suffolk, England und wurde in Diss, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Barton Blennerhasset è nato il nel aprile 1423 nel Attleborough, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Blennerhasset, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Joan de Lowdham, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Jane Margaret Heigham circa 1447, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1510, nel Haverhill, Suffolk, England, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Diss, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Barton Blennerhassetが1423年4月にイギリスノーフォルクアットレボロウで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Blennerhassetは15歳，母Johanna Joan de Lowdhamは14歳であった。約1447年にイギリスでJane Margaret Heighamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1510年11月8日にイギリススフォルクヘイバーヒルで87歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクディスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Barton Blennerhasset(이)가 1423년 4월 영국 노르폴크 애틀레버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Blennerhasset(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Joan de Lowdham(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1447년 영국에서 Jane Margaret Heigham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1510년 11월 8일 영국 수폴크 하버힐에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 디스에 묻혔다.

pt.Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Ki: Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Barton Blennerhasset nasceu em abril de 1423, em Attleborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Blennerhasset, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Joan de Lowdham, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Margaret Heigham aproximadamente 1447, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1510, em Haverhill, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Diss, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Ki: Great Waltham, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Barton Blennerhasset родился апрель 1423 г. в местности аттлебороую, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Blennerhasset было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Joan de Lowdham, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Margaret Heigham около 1447 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 ноября 1510 г. в местности хавирилл, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности дисс, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Barton Blennerhasset nació en abril de 1423, en Attleborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Blennerhasset, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Johanna Joan de Lowdham, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Jane Margaret Heigham aproximadamente 1447, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1510, en Haverhill, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Diss, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
